Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and promotes appreciation of cultural diversity (Target 4.7) through '文化介紹' (cultural introduction).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Develops language skills relevant for employment (Target 8.5). The '文化介紹' (cultural introduction) can also support sustainable tourism (Target 8.9).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Inferred link to safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4) through '文化介紹' (cultural introduction), which fosters appreciation for French culture.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Explicitly promotes responsible consumption via the instruction to '維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍' (Respect Copyright. Use genuine books).

Climate Action.reason: Directly addresses climate education (Target 13.3) through the course topic '談天氣、比較氣候' (Talk about weather, compare climates).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Supports the rule of law (Target 16.3) by instructing students to '維護智慧財產權' (Respect Copyright).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Learning a foreign language is a fundamental enabler for international cooperation, knowledge sharing, and partnerships (Targets 17.6, 17.16).
